Verse 1:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  Remember all the things we wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
  We were always meant to say goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  It never would've worked out right[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]
  We were never meant for do or die[/tab]


Refrain 1:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
I didn't come here to hold you[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
matter where we take this road[/tab]

[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
have loved me better[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]

You know that I love you so I [/tab]

love you enough [/tab]

to let you go
